fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 70. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 67.

suffering_zones: Formignano Hill-Climb: The race's defining climbing challenge with steep pitches through Apennine foothills. Early-season fitness may struggle here; this is where the race separates committed cyclists from casual participants.

Mid-Race Apennine Section: Sustained rolling terrain through foothills creates cumulative fatigue. The combination of continuous climbing and distance compounds physical demands in the 60-100 km range.
Final 20 km Push: Return to coast requires mental toughness after extended climbing. Fatigue combined with desire to finish strong creates the race's final suffering zone.

final_verdict.one_liner: A well-organized early-season regional classic offering scenic sea-to-hills routing and strong community experience for intermediate-to-advanced cyclists.

videos.title: Gran Fondo Selle Italia Via del Sale - long version
videos.description:
Il video racconta la Gran Fondo Selle Italia, gara ciclistica di primo piano nel panorama nazionale di settore, che nel 2014 ha festeggiato la diciottesima edizione.

Guarda anche la clip version dell'evento: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XEue9aVP9ec&feature=youtu.be
